    • of

      public static TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementDistributionType of(String value)
      Returns a TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementDistributionType with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be wrapped as TransferScheduleSummaryRetirementDistributionType
